title: Isle of Berk Advancement Plaques
description: New Advancement Plaques for the Isle of Berk Mod!
body:

[![kofi-singular-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/donate/kofi-singular-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

# Overview
If you love the Isle of Berk Mod and want to change that boring old advancements into something more interesting, use this Isle of Berk Advancement Plaques Resourcepack. Change the default advancement message into a Isle of Berk themed achievement.

# Important
The Advancement Plaques Mod is required for this to work.

## [Resourcepack Discord](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/39e1d151-f787-4346-9014-f14dc996f94e.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
